title: 2PACK DC9091 4.8Ah Ni-MH Replacement for Battery 14.4V Compatible with 14.4V Battery DE9091 DE9094 DW9091 DW9092 DW9094 DE9031 DE9502 DE9087 DE9140 Power Tools
features: Battery Specification: Type: Ni-MH Battery | Voltage: 14.4V | Capacity: 4.8Ah/4800mAh | Brand New | Replacement Battery for DC9091 14.4V Battery| 2Pcs.

Perfect Compatibility: Compatible with DC9091 14.4V Battery DE9098, DC9096, DC9098, DE9039, DE9095, DE9096, DW9096, DW9095, DW9098. Replacement for Cordless Power Tools DC330K DC410 DCD690KL DCD760B DCF059KL etc.

High Quality: Made of high-quality material ABS+PC, it improves the heat dissipation capacity of the battery, extends the running time by 2 times, is not easy to deform, has high stability, is easy to use when working, and can be used as an affordable alternative to the original battery.

Multiple Protection Measures: All products are tested by manufacturers, safe and reliable, and are CE and ROHS certified. All of our products are tested by manufacturers and meet and exceed OEM product specifications. It has the characteristics of overheating protection, overvoltage protection, overcurrent protection, overcharge protection, deep discharge protection, no memory effect, etc.

Professional Team: We offer a 30-day return policy, a 12-month warranty, and 24/7 online support. If you have any questions, simply click "Contact Seller" under "Your Order." We will resolve your issue within 24 hours. We hope you enjoy our products.
description: Product Specification: Package Contents: 2 x 14.4V 4.8Ah Replacement For DC9091 Battery and 1 x User Manual. Voltage: 14.4V Capacity: 4.8Ah/4800mAh Battery type: Ni-MH Product Condition: Brand New Replacement for DC9091 14.4V Battery Moldes: DE9098, DC9096, DE9039, DE9503, DE9095 DE9096, DW9096, DW9095, DW9098 Compatible with DC9091 14.4V Battery and Tools Models: DC Series: DC020 DC212 DC212B DC212KA DC212KB DC212KZ DC212N DC213KB DC330 DC330K DC330KA DC330KB DC330N DC380KA DC380KB DC380N DC385 DC385B DC385K DC390 DC390B DC390K DC390KA DC390KB DC390N DC410 DC410KA DC410KB DC410N DC411B DW Series: DW056 DW056K DW056K-2 DW056KS DW056N DW057K DW057K-2 DW057N DW059 DW059B DW059K-2 DW933K DW908 (Flash Light) Battery Maintenance: 1. Keep the Battery Clean. It's a good idea to clean dirty battery contacts with a cotton swab and alcohol. This helps maintain a good connection between the battery and the portable device. 2. Battery storage. If you don't plan on using the battery for a month or more, store it in a clean, dry, cool place away from heat and metal objects. Li-ion batteries will self-discharge during storage; remember to recharge the batteries before use. 3. Battery use. If the tool stops during use, release the trigger to reset and resume operation. If the tool still does not work, the battery needs to be recharged.
